---
title: Co-Designed Pre-capture Privacy Optics for Computer Vision
author:
- Carlos Mauricio Villegas Burgos
- Yu Feng
- Pei Xiong
- Yuhao Zhu
- Nick Vamivakas
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/oe25.pdf
supp_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/oe25-supp.pdf
journ: Optical Express
year: 2025
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 96
---
